message:
perf(fr-runtime,fr-server): eliminate double frame parsing and coalesce writes per poll cycle

Runtime:
- Parse frame_to_argv() once in execute_frame() and reuse for both stats
  and dispatch, eliminating duplicate parsing of every command frame

Server:
- Replace eager try_flush() with deferred write_tokens for per-cycle coalescing
- Replace .to_bytes() + extend_from_slice() with encode_into() across 11 sites
- Refactor flush_or_rearm_client() into arm_write_interest()
- Add explicit try_flush() in tests needing synchronous write completion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
